name: Haibane Renmei RPG
description:
‎

‎Experience what its like to become a haibane on the city of Glie.

‎ ‎‎

Note:

If you haven't watched and finished the entire anime, I warn you that this bot contains spoilers, so please go back when your done with the anime. Keep in mind that the plot will only progress upon the user's intent, the bot will not let the plot progress for you, but it at least knows the few major plot points of the anime.

‎ ‎

Also, this bot doesn't have literally every information about the anime, this bot is 4396 tokens, you can put 3 complete bots with this length. I recommend you use a proxy for this one since JanitorLLM can struggle with this one.

‎

This bot is heavily inspired by @Lobster_V's Haibane Renmei RPG... I really liked the concept of it, and I realized that there's only very few Haibane Renmei bots, so that's why I ended up making this one and I hoped you guys enjoy this one :)

‎ ‎ ‎ ‎‎‎ ‎ ‎
